name: Spinach Salad Orientale
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------DRESSING-------------------------
1 cup sunflower oil
3/4 cup chopped onion
1 tablespoon Worcestershire sauce
1/4 cup red wine vinegar
1/2 cup sugar
1 teaspoon salt
1/3 cup catsup
Mix all dressing ingredients together first. Refrigerate.
Mix salad together. Just before serving, toss salad with dressing. Serve.
